title: Vitamin B5 (pantothenate)
body_html:
Vitamin B5 is water-soluble vitamin of the B complex.

Functions
  • used in the synthesis of coenzyme A (CoA) and fatty acid synthesis

Deficiency of vitamin B5 is rare.
